steps.t: Andyri is at Lin Giliath, in Meluinen on the North Downs. You have been told that Andyri of Lin Giliath is seeking Wardens for some task of importance…
Andyri is at Lin Giliath, in Meluinen on the North Downs. You have proven a valuable ally in the darkness of the Stone-troll caves and should speak no…
